hero.title: Simple Websites That Bring Real Clients
hero.subtitle: We build clean, fast websites for small businesses that want clarity, structure, and results — not unnecessary complexity.

services.title: what we do
services.subtitle: we focus on practical digital tools that help small businesses get and manage real client inquiries.

businessWebsites.title: business websites
businessWebsites.description: clean, fast one-page websites designed to present your business clearly and professionally. built for clarity, speed, and mobile users.

leadCapture.title: lead capture setup
leadCapture.description: structured contact forms and clear call-to-actions that make it easy for potential clients to reach you.

telegramNotifications.title: telegram & instant notifications
telegramNotifications.description: we connect your website to telegram or email so you receive new inquiries instantly — no manual checking, no missed messages.

websiteOptimization.title: website optimization
websiteOptimization.description: we improve existing websites by simplifying structure, improving performance, and making them more conversion-focused.

about.title: about SolidLine Digital
about.p1: solidline digital is a small, focused web studio built around a simple idea — most small businesses don't need complex systems. they need clarity, structure, and a website that actually works.
about.p2: we build clean, fast websites and set up simple automation so business owners can focus on their work instead of chasing messages or fixing technical problems.
about.quote: no inflated promises. no unnecessary features. just practical solutions that make sense.

contact.title: let's talk about your project
contact.p1: tell us a bit about your business and what you're looking to build. we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.p2: no pressure. no complicated process. just a short form and we'll take it from there.

portfolio.title: our work
portfolio.subtitle: clean, fast websites for small businesses — no fluff, just results.

beautyStudio.description: Luxury beauty salon website with booking integration
